name: Survival Guide
text:
Jungle Survival Guide

Resources: Chop Wood Groves for wood. Mine Stone Outcrops for stone. Gather Herb Patches for berries and roots.

Hunger: Rises over time. Cook raw meat or 3 berries at a Campfire to eat. Starving damages health!

Warmth: Drops at night (8pm-6am). Use a Campfire to warm up. Freezing drains stamina!

Crafting: Use a Workbench to craft gear. Stone Hatchet: 2W 2S. Bone Shield: 3W 1S. Obsidian Spear: 3W 3S.

Building: Find Build Sites in the wilds. Spend 3 Wood to build a campfire outpost for cooking and warmth.

Hunting: Kill boars and crocs for raw meat. Panthers drop fangs. Spiders drop silk.

name: Secrets of the Jungle Trolls
text:
Secrets of the Jungle Trolls

The Jungle Isle has been home to four troll tribes since before memory. Each tribe has carved out its territory and developed unique traditions.

The Forest Trolls dwell in the canopy, masters of ambush and natural poison. They paint their bodies with jungle pigments and speak a dialect thick with chirps and clicks learned from the birds above.

The River Trolls control the waterways, trading fish and freshwater with inland trolls. Their massive wicker structures line the riverbanks, and their children learn to swim before they can walk.

The Blood Trolls haunt the open plains, ranging far and wide in war-bands. Their battle-drums can be heard for miles, a warning to all who hear them. They believe combat is the highest spiritual act.

The Shadow Trolls hide in the deepest jungle, communing with spirits unknown to other tribes. Their voodoo arts can bend reality itself, and they alone can speak with the ancestors who watch from beyond the veil.

name: Tribal Recipes
text:
Tribal Recipes
As taught by Mama Zul, Shaman of the River Trolls

Tribal Brew: Mix jungle berries with jungle root in a bark cup. Heat over fire for two breaths. Drink when cool. Restores vigor and heals minor wounds.

Berserker's Blood: Crush panther fang into powder. Mix with jungle mushroom juice and a measure of blood-salt from the tidal pools. Drink before battle. Grants terrible strength but clouds the mind.

Hunter's Tonic: Brew bird feathers in hot water until the liquid turns golden. Add jungle berry for flavor. Drink at dawn. Sharpens the eye and quickens the step.

Voodoo Potion: Grind a dried jungle mushroom with crocodile scale. Blend with swamp water collected at midnight. Handle with care - this potion carries a hex inside it.
